title: paeonia hybrida var. intermedia
intro: Paeonia hybrida var. intermedia, also known as the garden peony, is a hybrid of the common peony (Paeonia officinalis) and the tree peony (Paeonia suffruticosa), resulting in a vigorous and ornamental plant. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Paeonia hybrida var. intermedia include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as providing relief from menstrual cramps and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as tinctures, infusions, and ointments, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
